三角形內角和 = 180°

底角 = (180° - 31°) ÷ 2 = 74°

Isosceles: two base angles equal.
Sum = 180°
Vertex = 31°
Base angle = (180° - 31°) ÷ 2 = 74°

直角三角形有一個 90° 角。
三角形內角和 = 180°
另一銳角 = 180° - 90° - 64° = 26°
explanation_en:
Right triangle has a 90° angle.
Sum = 180°
Other acute = 180° - 90° - 64° = 26°

等腰三角形兩底角相等。
三角形內角和 = 180°
頂角 = 51°
底角 = (180° - 51°) ÷ 2 = 64°
explanation_en:
Isosceles: two base angles equal.
Sum = 180°
Vertex = 51°
Base angle = (180° - 51°) ÷ 2 = 64°
